export type MogSdkVersionStoreRuntime = 'node' | 'wasm'

export type SyncMode = 'immediate' | 'batch' | 'manual'
export type TagMatcher = string
export type TypedMogSdkEvent<K extends MogSdkEventType> = K extends keyof MogSdkEventPayloads ? MogSdkEvent<MogSdkEventPayloads[K]> : MogSdkEvent<unknown>

export type AccessTarget = { readonly kind: 'workbook'; } | { readonly kind: 'sheet'; readonly sheetId: SheetId; } | { readonly kind: 'column'; readonly colId: ColId; readonly sheetId: SheetId; }
export type ApiCompatibilityStatus = 'canonical' | 'contract_extension' | 'supported_alias' | 'input_alias' | 'deprecated_alias' | 'semantic_compatibility' | 'structured_diagnostic' | 'rejected'
export type ApiCompatibilitySurface = 'typescript' | 'kernel' | 'executeCode-preflight' | 'api-describe' | 'agent-guidance' | 'docs' | 'python' | 'api-eval'
export type ApiGuidanceCategory = 'bootstrap' | 'sync-load' | 'workbook' | 'worksheet' | 'range' | 'formatting' | 'tables' | 'filters' | 'compatibility' | 'charts' | 'pivots' | 'names' | 'file-io' | ' ...
export type ApiGuidanceDiagnosticCode = 'MOG001_FOREIGN_API_DIALECT' | 'MOG002_MOG_API_USAGE' | 'MOG003_COMPATIBILITY_REJECTED'
export type ApiGuidanceDialect = 'officejs' | 'mog-version'
export type ApiGuidanceExplanation = ForeignApiGuidanceExplanation | MogApiGuidanceExplanation | MogApiCompatibilityExplanation
export type ApiGuidanceMatcher = ApiGuidanceSymbolMatcher | ApiGuidanceCompoundMatcher
export type ApiGuidanceMatcherKind = 'member-chain' | 'call' | 'assignment' | 'token' | 'compound'
export type ApiGuidanceTargetKind = 'method' | 'property' | 'subApiAccessor' | 'rootImport'
export type CellRawValue = CellValuePrimitive | RichText
export type CellValue = CellValuePrimitive | CellError
export type CellWriteData = Pick<StoreCellData, 'raw' | 'formula' | 'identityFormula' | 'computed'>
export type ChartRenderingConfig = 'auto' | ChartRenderingOptions
export type ControlPlaneCapabilityGateRolloutStage = 'disabled' | 'shadow-only' | 'headless-local' | 'ui-beta' | 'collab-interop-beta' | 'default-on'
export type ControlPlaneCapabilityGateStage = ControlPlaneCapabilityGateRolloutStage
export type ControlPlaneCompareAndSwapResultReason = 'unavailable'
export type ControlPlaneCompareAndSwapResultStatus = 'not-applied'
export type ControlPlaneDiagnosticSeverity = 'info' | 'warning' | 'error'
export type ControlPlaneDryRunResultReason = 'noop' | 'unavailable'
export type ControlPlaneDryRunResultStatus = 'not-applied'
export type ControlPlaneEntrypointId = (typeof CONTROL_PLANE_ENTRYPOINT_IDS)[number]
export type ControlPlaneEntrypointStatus = 'available' | 'disabled' | 'unavailable'
export type ControlPlanePreflightDigestAlgorithm = 'sha256' | 'opaque'
export type ControlPlaneReadSnapshotStatus = 'available' | 'disabled' | 'unavailable'
export type ControlPlaneRuntimeKind = 'headless-sdk' | 'browser' | 'workerd' | 'tauri' | 'node' | 'unknown'
export type ControlPlaneShadowObservationHook = (event: ControlPlaneShadowObservationEvent) => void
export type DescribeResult = OverviewResult | InterfaceResult | MethodResult | TypeResult | null
export type DocumentSource = { readonly type: 'path'; readonly path: string; } | { readonly type: 'bytes'; readonly data: Uint8Array; }
export type FormulaA1 = string & { readonly [formulaA1Brand]: true; }
export type GateEvidencePreflightDigest = ControlPlanePreflightDigest
export type HeadlessCodeExecutorFactory = (engine: HeadlessEngine) => { execute(code: string, options?: CodeExecutionOptions): Promise<CodeExecutionResult>; cancelExecution?(executionId: string): void ...
export type MogCloseBehavior = 'save' | 'skipSave'
export type MogDocumentDurabilityMode = 'ephemeral' | 'durableLocal' | 'localFirst' | 'remoteBacked' | 'readOnly'
export type MogDocumentSource = { readonly type: 'blank'; } | { readonly type: 'bytes'; readonly data: Uint8Array; readonly format?: MogFileFormat; } | { readonly type: 'path'; readonly path: string;  ...
export type MogDocumentStatus = 'creating' | 'ready' | 'saving' | 'closing' | 'closed' | 'error'
export type MogFileFormat = 'xlsx' | 'csv' | 'ooxml'
export type MogSaveMode = 'workbookSave' | 'documentCheckpoint' | 'exportOnly' | 'noSave'
export type MogSdkErrorCode = 'INVALID_ARGUMENT' | 'NOT_FOUND' | 'CONFLICT' | 'AUTHORIZATION_DENIED' | 'READ_ONLY' | 'DISPOSED' | 'IMPORT_ERROR' | 'EXPORT_ERROR' | 'COMPUTE_ERROR' | 'TRANSPORT_ERROR'  ...
export type MogSdkEventOrigin = 'local' | 'remote' | 'system'
export type MogSdkEventScope = { readonly kind: 'document'; } | { readonly kind: 'sheet'; readonly sheetId: SheetId; } | { readonly kind: 'range'; readonly sheetId: SheetId; readonly range: string; }
export type MogSdkEventType = 'document.created' | 'document.ready' | 'document.saving' | 'document.saved' | 'document.dirtyChanged' | 'document.closing' | 'document.closed' | 'document.error' | 'shee ...
export type MogSdkProviderOwnership = 'sdk' | 'host'
export type MogSdkSavePathIssue = 'save-path-invalid' | 'save-path-writer-unavailable' | 'save-path-write-failed' | 'save-callback-failed'
export type MogSdkSupportedVersionStoreKind = (typeof MOG_SDK_SUPPORTED_VERSION_STORE_KINDS)[number]
export type MogSdkUnsupportedVersionStoreKind = (typeof MOG_SDK_UNSUPPORTED_VERSION_STORE_KINDS)[number]
export type MogSdkVersionStoreConfig = MogSdkSupportedVersionStoreKind | MogSdkVersionStoreConfigObject
export type MogSdkVersionStoreConfigObject = MogSdkMemoryVersionStoreConfig | MogSdkMemoryDurableSnapshotVersionStoreConfig | MogSdkIndexedDbVersionStoreConfig | MogSdkBrowserVersionStoreConfig | MogS ...
export type MogSdkVersionStoreDiagnosticCode = 'MOG_SDK_VERSION_STORE_INVALID_CONFIG' | 'MOG_SDK_VERSION_STORE_UNSUPPORTED'
export type MogSdkVersionStoreRuntime = 'node' | 'wasm'
export type PolicyId = string & { readonly __brand?: 'PolicyId'; }
export type RecordValues = { [key: string]: CellValue; }
export type SyncMode = 'immediate' | 'batch' | 'manual'
export type TagMatcher = string
export type TypedMogSdkEvent<K extends MogSdkEventType> = K extends keyof MogSdkEventPayloads ? MogSdkEvent<MogSdkEventPayloads[K]> : MogSdkEvent<unknown>
export type { SheetId }

## dist/version-store.d.ts
export class MogSdkVersionStoreConfigError extends Error { readonly diagnostic: MogSdkVersionStoreDiagnostic; readonly diagnostics: readonly MogSdkVersionStoreDiagnostic[]; constructor(diagnostic: Mog ...
export const MOG_SDK_SUPPORTED_VERSION_STORE_KINDS: readonly ["memory", "in-memory", "memory-durable-snapshot", "indexeddb", "browser"]
export const MOG_SDK_UNSUPPORTED_VERSION_STORE_KINDS: readonly ["node-file", "nodeFile", "filesystem", "file-system", "node-filesystem", "nodeFileSystem", "node:fs", "fs"]
export function createSdkVersionStoreLifecycleConfig(versionStore: MogSdkVersionStoreConfig | undefined, options: MogSdkVersionStoreLifecycleOptions): MogSdkVersionStoreLifecycleConfig | undefined

export type MogSdkSupportedVersionStoreKind = (typeof MOG_SDK_SUPPORTED_VERSION_STORE_KINDS)[number]
export type MogSdkUnsupportedVersionStoreKind = (typeof MOG_SDK_UNSUPPORTED_VERSION_STORE_KINDS)[number]
export type MogSdkVersionStoreConfig = MogSdkSupportedVersionStoreKind | MogSdkVersionStoreConfigObject
export type MogSdkVersionStoreConfigObject = MogSdkMemoryVersionStoreConfig | MogSdkMemoryDurableSnapshotVersionStoreConfig | MogSdkIndexedDbVersionStoreConfig | MogSdkBrowserVersionStoreConfig | MogS ...
export type MogSdkVersionStoreDiagnosticCode = 'MOG_SDK_VERSION_STORE_INVALID_CONFIG' | 'MOG_SDK_VERSION_STORE_UNSUPPORTED'
export type MogSdkVersionStoreRuntime = 'node' | 'wasm'

export type CellRawValue = CellValuePrimitive | RichText
export type CellValue = CellValuePrimitive | CellError
export type ChartRenderingConfig = 'auto' | ChartRenderingOptions
export type ControlPlaneCapabilityGateRolloutStage = 'disabled' | 'shadow-only' | 'headless-local' | 'ui-beta' | 'collab-interop-beta' | 'default-on'
export type ControlPlaneCapabilityGateStage = ControlPlaneCapabilityGateRolloutStage
export type ControlPlaneCompareAndSwapResultReason = 'unavailable'
export type ControlPlaneCompareAndSwapResultStatus = 'not-applied'
export type ControlPlaneDiagnosticSeverity = 'info' | 'warning' | 'error'
export type ControlPlaneDryRunResultReason = 'noop' | 'unavailable'
export type ControlPlaneDryRunResultStatus = 'not-applied'
export type ControlPlaneEntrypointId = (typeof CONTROL_PLANE_ENTRYPOINT_IDS)[number]
export type ControlPlaneEntrypointStatus = 'available' | 'disabled' | 'unavailable'
export type ControlPlanePreflightDigestAlgorithm = 'sha256' | 'opaque'
export type ControlPlaneReadSnapshotStatus = 'available' | 'disabled' | 'unavailable'
export type ControlPlaneRuntimeKind = 'headless-sdk' | 'browser' | 'workerd' | 'tauri' | 'node' | 'unknown'
export type ControlPlaneShadowObservationHook = (event: ControlPlaneShadowObservationEvent) => void
export type DocumentSource = { readonly type: 'path'; readonly path: string; } | { readonly type: 'bytes'; readonly data: Uint8Array; }
export type FormulaA1 = string & { readonly [formulaA1Brand]: true; }
export type GateEvidencePreflightDigest = ControlPlanePreflightDigest
export type MogSdkSupportedVersionStoreKind = (typeof MOG_SDK_SUPPORTED_VERSION_STORE_KINDS)[number]
export type MogSdkUnsupportedVersionStoreKind = (typeof MOG_SDK_UNSUPPORTED_VERSION_STORE_KINDS)[number]
export type MogSdkVersionStoreConfig = MogSdkSupportedVersionStoreKind | MogSdkVersionStoreConfigObject
